title: ZeroVision
description:
Adds cool stuff like 
-3d Ores
-3d Plants and Flowers
-cool textures
body:
# **ZeroVision**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jeMDasfIOEo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is the very early alpha release of my pack 
(since a lot of people on my discord wished for it)

In my pack i basically want to recreate everything cool i saw in resourcepacks in my own style!
Like 3D Flowers and Plants, or 3d Ores, or custom workbenches!

In my pack there is missing a lot of textures, animations, item-textures and basically the whole GUI, thats normal since this is the alpha of a work in progress resourcepack :)

**Note:**_You can load my pack on top of diffrent ones, if u want to have a textures for Items i didnt made so far!_ (The Resourcepack thats the highest in the list has the highest priority)

Heres some preview pictures:

3D-Ores:![3D-Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab9020c84ef683707ebdb613a7839bdc62306f7a.jpeg)

3D-Flowers:![3D-Flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eba40cdb8d185e4391d74510950751128336485.jpeg)

3D-Foliage:![3D-Foliage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcc7410028a6f64d1279b73a9bbc60fe94a8425e.jpeg)

Other:![Other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77bc491390744b4b590d25109a1ff197a8e10c7f.jpeg)

Preview:![Preview1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d46885b2ba5145100a06eaed3b62c1819d9e112.jpeg)
![Preview2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c6069c08eefbbbb7b0a4e20e90c6517e1d088de.jpeg)![Preview3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/187e81a805623f5c9adc1d8ec14f9f512241a4f9.jpeg)

Im using Complementary Shaders in the screenshots!
